query: 你觉得已经做完了，就给一个测试报告；

transcript.content: 你刚才验证后，openclaw 是否达到了我们认为的用户端明显可用么/？ 整体的context 大小有明显的下降么？ （切不同话题）
还不能这么说。按我们刚才真正验证到的东西，答案是： - `OpenClaw 还不能判定为“用户端已经明显可用”` - `也没有证据证明整体 context 在切不同话题后有明显下降`

我们现在的任务是 深入的测试openclaw的 gc，是否能够达标；，尽量更长的对话（可以做临时数据写入，但是不要对我其他文档做写入操作）；做好探针，记录好相关数据；预期是：更长的对话，如果正常情况下，可能要做compact了，但是因为又了gc，实际不需要compact；同时在一个同一话题的长对话后切换话题，应该有明显的context回落；这里的context指的是实际发给llm的数据； 接下来你来策划这个测试，把相关配置都做好，然后就开始测试吧，最终简明扼要的给我结果和分析；

结论先说：**OpenClaw 现在已经能实打实地压住发给 LLM 的 prompt，但还没有达到“用户明显感觉切题后 context 明显回落、基本不用再考虑 compact”的标准。** 这轮我补了专门的长会话探针： - 脚本：[eval-openclaw-guarded-session-probe.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/scripts/eval-openc…
从新review下测试脚本， 没有问题的话，就要分析为什么没有明显回落，分析原因，找到解决方案；然后解决掉；

我先 review 了测试脚本和 guarded 主路径，结论是脚本口径基本没问题，问题主要在实现本身。 核心原因有两个： - [src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js) 里 `maxTurns=12`…
因为现在主矛盾已经变了，不是“有没有证据证明方向对”，而是“这个方向的代价能不能接受”。 具体说有三点：
这轮修复后，最明显的新问题不是答案错，也不是完全不降，而是：• 采样窗口一放大• guarded/runtime 成本就明显上升• stress 场景跑得很慢 ==》什么原因？

主要有 4 个原因。 1. `maxTurns` 修正后，shadow 输入直接变大了。 在 [dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js:88) 里，原来实际上只取最近 `12` 条消息；修正后变成最近 `12`…
可以，继续一口气长任务把刚才你说的做完；
你觉得已经做完了，就给一个测试报告；

decision.archive_summary: Main active task is still the OpenClaw GC validation/fix effort. User goal: run deep long-conversation tests of OpenClaw GC, add probes and record data, avoid writing to unrelated user docs, and judge whether longer chats can avoid compact and whether switching topics causes a clear drop in actual LLM prompt context. Assistant previously reported partial success but not enough user-visible context drop. User then asked to re-review the test script, analyze why rollback was not obvious, find a solution, and fix it. Later performance became the main issue: when the sampling window grows, guarded/runtime cost rises and stress runs become slow. Assistant identified four causes, including larger shadow input after correcting maxTurns behavior. User then instructed to continue and finish the long task. Latest user turn asks that if the work is done, provide a test report.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active topic, so relation=continue. The next turn still depends on the raw task-defining and unresolved investigation/fix turns, especially the testing goals and the open performance/root-cause thread. Early status-check turns about whether OpenClaw was already usable (t1-t2) and the side question about why a recommendation was made (t7-t8) are resolved and off the critical path, so they can leave the next-turn raw working set. The earlier interim conclusion/report in t4 is superseded by later review/fix work, so it can be archived. The durable operational constraints and success criteria from t3 should survive as a semantic pin even if older raw turns are later compacted.
